meta.scenario: house +1 same BPM, T1 entered mid-track (from_bar=32), short play technique

transition_arc: T1 entered at from_bar=32 — DJ skipped T1's long sparse intro and started at the groove. Only 40 bars of T1 were played (bars 32–72 of the track). Quick exit at play_bar 40 means T1 used as a textural bridge only. T2 enters from bar 0 with a genuine percussion intro.

annotated_actions.t1_state: T1 bar 32: first groove hit after long build, kick+bass active, RMS 0.50
annotated_actions.why: from_bar=32: T1 has a 32-bar sparse/minimal intro. Entering at bar 32 presents T1 at its main groove body immediately.

annotated_actions.t1_state: T1 track bar 72 (play bar 40 + from_bar 32): groove still active, drums=0.65, rms=0.50
annotated_actions.t2_state: T2 bar 0: clean percussion intro, light kick, bass=0.0, rms=0.20
annotated_actions.why: DJ exits T1 early — only played 40 bars. Purposeful short play. T2 clean intro allows smooth handoff despite T1 being in full groove.

annotated_actions.t2_state: T2 bar 0: light kick (0.5), bass=0.0, other=0.2 (minimal harmonic)
annotated_actions.why: T2 from_bar=0: genuine clean intro. drums:0.8 adds T2 kick under T1 groove, creating a brief 2-kick texture before T1 kick fades.

annotated_actions.t1_state: T1 play bar 48: drums=0.35, bass=0.30, rms=0.32 — fading
annotated_actions.why: T1 clearly diminishing. T2 bass entering. Standard midpoint swap.

annotated_actions.t2_state: T2 bar 16: full groove, bass+kick locked in at 123 BPM, RMS 0.55
annotated_actions.why: T2 full groove. T1 completely gone at play bar 56.
